note: Run /eval to populate pass_rate before promoting to regression suite

evals.prompt: Crie uma pagina de listagem de produtos usando Server Components em Next.js 15. Com Suspense e loading states.
evals.expected_output: Next.js page with Server Components, async data fetching, Suspense boundaries, skeleton fallbacks
expectations: Uses Server Components as default (no 'use client' on page)
Async/await for data fetching directly in the component
TypeScript with strict types for product data

evals.prompt: Crie um formulario de contato com React Actions e validacao Zod. Campos: nome, email, mensagem.
evals.expected_output: Contact form using Server Actions with Zod validation and feedback
expectations: Server Action defined with 'use server' directive
Error handling with user-facing error messages
Accessible form with labels and error associations

evals.prompt: Implemente infinite scroll para uma lista de posts de blog. Use TanStack Query para data fetching.
evals.expected_output: Infinite scroll with useInfiniteQuery, Intersection Observer, loading and error states
expectations: Intersection Observer for scroll detection trigger
Error state handling with retry option

evals.prompt: Implemente um fluxo de autenticacao com login, registro e redirect protegido. Next.js middleware.
evals.expected_output: Auth flow with login/register forms, session management, protected routes via middleware

evals.prompt: Crie um dashboard real-time com 4 KPI cards e um grafico que atualiza a cada 5 segundos.
evals.expected_output: Real-time dashboard with polling/WebSocket, chart library, auto-refresh, animations
expectations: Polling or WebSocket for real-time data updates
Chart component using Recharts or similar library
Smooth transition animations on data updates
Responsive grid layout for cards and chart
